Upstream repository: `https://github.com/nicholasyangyang/codex-bridge`

Vendored commit: `306d9964b041581abc2469933deb18c1af82e8c1`

Vendored files in this directory are copied from the upstream repository so the installer can work without a runtime `git clone`.

The upstream `README.md` and `README_zh.md` both state that `codex-bridge` is licensed under MIT.
